subcodes.first_line: O ye two servants of the divine Threshold! Though in body ye are not present in the gathering of the spiritually-minded [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو بنده درگاه الهی هر چند بجسم در محضر روحانیان حاضر نیستید و در محفل
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @firmness in the Covenant
